organic.title: OpenAI API Pricing — GPT-5, GPT-4.1, o3
organic.snippet: GPT-5: $15/1M input tokens, $60/1M output tokens. GPT-5 mini: $0.40/1M input, $1.60/1M output. o3: $10/1M input, $40/1M output. Volume discounts available.

organic.title: GPT-5 vs GPT-4o: Complete Pricing & Performance Comparison 2026
organic.snippet: GPT-5 is 3x more expensive than GPT-4o but scores 40% higher on coding benchmarks. For most applications, GPT-5 mini offers the best cost-performance ratio.

organic.title: OpenAI GPT-5 API — Getting Started Guide
organic.snippet: Learn how to use the OpenAI API. Create an API key, make your first request, and explore models including GPT-5, o3, and DALL·E 3.

organic.title: Cheaper GPT-5 Alternatives: OpenRouter vs Together vs Groq
organic.snippet: OpenRouter offers GPT-5 at 15% lower cost via aggregated routing. Groq's Llama 3.3 70B is free and achieves 85% of GPT-5 performance on most tasks.

organic.title: r/MachineLearning — Is GPT-5 worth the price in 2026?
organic.snippet: Community consensus: use GPT-5 for complex reasoning tasks, GPT-5 mini for everything else. Claude Sonnet 4.6 is competitive at 60% of the price.

peopleAlsoAsk.question: How much does the GPT-5 API cost?
peopleAlsoAsk.answer: GPT-5 costs $15 per million input tokens and $60 per million output tokens as of March 2026. GPT-5 mini is significantly cheaper at $0.40/$1.60 per million tokens.
peopleAlsoAsk.title: OpenAI API Pricing

peopleAlsoAsk.question: Is GPT-5 available via API?
peopleAlsoAsk.answer: Yes. GPT-5 has been available via the OpenAI API since May 2025. Access requires a paid OpenAI account with API credits.
peopleAlsoAsk.title: GPT-5 API Documentation — OpenAI

aiOverview.text: As of early 2026, the OpenAI GPT-5 API costs $15 per million input tokens and $60 per million output tokens. GPT-5 mini offers a more affordable option at $0.40 input / $1.60 output per million tokens. For budget-conscious developers, alternatives like Groq (free Llama 3.3 70B), Google Gemini Flash ($0.075/1M), and Claude Haiku 4.5 ($0.25/1M input) offer strong performance at a fraction of the cost.

knowledgePanel.title: OpenAI
knowledgePanel.description: OpenAI is an American artificial intelligence research laboratory. Its products include ChatGPT, DALL·E, Whisper, and the GPT series of large language models.
